Summary:
- Updated `ErrorType` handling in all existing semconv versions with the helper:
  - `semconv/v1.34.0/error_type.go`
  - `semconv/v1.36.0/error_type.go`
  - `semconv/v1.37.0/error_type.go`

  - `internal/tools/semconvkit/templates/error_type.go.tmpl`
- The implementation detects Go `fmt.Errorf("%w", ...)` wrapping errors by comparing against the runtime type produced by `fmt.Errorf("%w", errors.New(""))`, then repeatedly unwraps only those `fmt.wrapError` layers before falling back to reflection for the reported error type.
- This preserves custom wrapper behavior while avoiding unhelpful `*fmt.wrapError` values for standard `fmt` wrappers.
- Temporary regression test cases were added to reproduce the bug, verified failing before the fix and passing after the fix, then removed as requested.
